lemmas.name: UpdateStatsPreservesColorLen
ensures: ghost var np: Participant := UpdateStats(p, idx, pairings, bye, results); |np.colorHistory| == np.whiteCount + np.blackCount

lemmas.name: UpdateStatsPairingsColorLen
ensures: ghost var np: Participant := UpdateStatsFromPairings(p, idx, pairings, results, i); |np.colorHistory| == np.whiteCount + np.blackCount

lemmas.name: AllStatsPreservesScores
requires: forall i: int {:trigger participants[i]} :: 0 <= i < |participants| ==> participants[i].score2x >= 0
ensures: ghost var withStats: seq<Participant> := seq(|participants|, (i: int) requires 0 <= i < |participants| => UpdateStats(participants[i], i, pairings, bye, results)); forall i: int {:trigger withStats[i]} :: 0 <= i < |withStats| ==> withStats[i].score2x >= 0

lemmas.name: AllStatsPreservesColorLen
ensures: ghost var withStats: seq<Participant> := seq(|participants|, (i: int) requires 0 <= i < |participants| => UpdateStats(participants[i], i, pairings, bye, results)); ColorHistoryConsistency(withStats)

lemmas.name: AllStatsPreservesSymmetry
ensures: ghost var withStats: seq<Participant> := seq(|participants|, (i: int) requires 0 <= i < |participants| => UpdateStats(participants[i], i, pairings, bye, results)); OpponentsSymmetric(withStats)

lemmas.name: UpdateAllPreservesScores
requires: forall i: int {:trigger participants[i]} :: 0 <= i < |participants| ==> participants[i].score2x >= 0
ensures: ghost var np: seq<Participant> := UpdateAllParticipants(participants, pairings, bye, results); forall i: int {:trigger np[i]} :: 0 <= i < |np| ==> np[i].score2x >= 0

lemmas.name: AddAllOpponentsPreservesScores
requires: forall k: int {:trigger participants[k]} :: 0 <= k < |participants| ==> participants[k].score2x >= 0
ensures: ghost var np: seq<Participant> := AddAllOpponents(participants, pairings, i); forall k: int {:trigger np[k]} :: 0 <= k < |np| ==> np[k].score2x >= 0

lemmas.name: AddParticipantPreservesOpponents
ensures: ghost var p: Participant := Participant(name, 0, 0, 0, [], false, {}); ghost var ps: seq<Participant> := participants + [p]; OpponentsSymmetric(ps) && OpponentsValid(ps)

lemmas.name: ChooseColorsPreservesColorDiff
ensures: ghost var pair: Pairing := ChooseColors(p1idx, p2idx, p1, p2); ghost var c1: Color := if pair.whiteIdx == p1idx then White else Black; ghost var c2: Color := if pair.whiteIdx == p2idx then White else Black; -2 <= ColorDiff(p1) + (if c1 == White then 1 else -1) <= 2 && -2 <= ColorDiff(p2) + (if c2 == White then 1 else -1) <= 2

predicates.name: NoThreeConsecutive
predicates.body: forall i: int, _t#0: int, _t#1: int {:trigger history[_t#1], history[_t#0], history[i]} | _t#1 == i - 2 && _t#0 == i - 1 :: 2 <= i && i < |history| ==> !(history[i] == history[_t#0] && history[_t#0] == history[_t#1])
conjuncts: forall i: int, _t#0: int, _t#1: int {:trigger history[_t#1], history[_t#0], history[i]} | _t#1 == i - 2 && _t#0 == i - 1 :: 2 <= i && i < |history| ==> !(history[i] == history[_t#0] && history[_t#0] == history[_t#1])

predicates.name: OpponentsSymmetric
predicates.body: forall i: int, j: int {:trigger participants[j], participants[i]} :: 0 <= i < |participants| && 0 <= j < |participants| && i != j ==> (j in participants[i].opponents) == (i in participants[j].opponents)
conjuncts: forall i: int, j: int {:trigger participants[j], participants[i]} :: 0 <= i < |participants| && 0 <= j < |participants| && i != j ==> (j in participants[i].opponents) == (i in participants[j].opponents)

predicates.name: ValidIndices
predicates.body: forall p: Pairing {:trigger p.blackIdx} {:trigger p.whiteIdx} {:trigger p in pairings} :: (p in pairings ==> p.whiteIdx < n) && (p in pairings ==> p.blackIdx < n) && (p in pairings ==> p.whiteIdx != p.blackIdx)
conjuncts: forall p: Pairing {:trigger p.blackIdx} {:trigger p.whiteIdx} {:trigger p in pairings} :: (p in pairings ==> p.whiteIdx < n) && (p in pairings ==> p.blackIdx < n) && (p in pairings ==> p.whiteIdx != p.blackIdx)

predicates.name: PairingsDistinct
predicates.body: forall i: int, j: int {:trigger pairings[j], pairings[i]} :: (0 <= i < j < |pairings| ==> pairings[i].whiteIdx != pairings[j].whiteIdx) && (0 <= i < j < |pairings| ==> pairings[i].whiteIdx != pairings[j].blackIdx) && (0 <= i < j < |pairings| ==> pairings[i].blackIdx != pairings[j].whiteIdx) && (0 <= i < j < |pairings| ==> pairings[i].blackIdx != pairings[j].blackIdx)
conjuncts: forall i: int, j: int {:trigger pairings[j], pairings[i]} :: (0 <= i < j < |pairings| ==> pairings[i].whiteIdx != pairings[j].whiteIdx) && (0 <= i < j < |pairings| ==> pairings[i].whiteIdx != pairings[j].blackIdx) && (0 <= i < j < |pairings| ==> pairings[i].blackIdx != pairings[j].whiteIdx) && (0 <= i < j < |pairings| ==> pairings[i].blackIdx != pairings[j].blackIdx)

predicates.name: NoRematchPairings
predicates.body: forall p: Pairing {:trigger p.blackIdx} {:trigger p.whiteIdx} {:trigger p in pairings} :: (p in pairings ==> p.whiteIdx < |participants|) && (p in pairings ==> p.blackIdx < |participants|) && (p in pairings ==> !(p.blackIdx in participants[p.whiteIdx].opponents)) && (p in pairings ==> !(p.whiteIdx in participants[p.blackIdx].opponents))
conjuncts: forall p: Pairing {:trigger p.blackIdx} {:trigger p.whiteIdx} {:trigger p in pairings} :: (p in pairings ==> p.whiteIdx < |participants|) && (p in pairings ==> p.blackIdx < |participants|) && (p in pairings ==> !(p.blackIdx in participants[p.whiteIdx].opponents)) && (p in pairings ==> !(p.whiteIdx in participants[p.blackIdx].opponents))

predicates.name: ColorHistoryConsistency
predicates.body: forall i: int {:trigger participants[i]} :: 0 <= i < |participants| ==> |participants[i].colorHistory| == participants[i].whiteCount + participants[i].blackCount
conjuncts: forall i: int {:trigger participants[i]} :: 0 <= i < |participants| ==> |participants[i].colorHistory| == participants[i].whiteCount + participants[i].blackCount

predicates.name: OpponentsValid
predicates.body: forall i: int {:trigger participants[i]} :: 0 <= i < |participants| ==> forall j: int {:trigger j in participants[i].opponents} :: j in participants[i].opponents ==> j < |participants|
conjuncts: forall i: int {:trigger participants[i]} :: 0 <= i < |participants| ==> forall j: int {:trigger j in participants[i].opponents} :: j in participants[i].opponents ==> j < |participants|

predicates.name: ActiveRoundValid
predicates.body: m.activeRound.Some? ==> ghost var r: ActiveRound := m.activeRound.value; |r.results| == |r.pairings| && ValidIndices(r.pairings, |m.participants|) && PairingsDistinct(r.pairings) && (r.bye.Some? ==> r.bye.value < |m.participants| && !m.participants[r.bye.value].byeReceived && forall p: Pairing {:trigger p.blackIdx} {:trigger p.whiteIdx} {:trigger p in r.pairings} :: (p in r.pairings ==> p.whiteIdx != r.bye.value) && (p in r.pairings ==> p.blackIdx != r.bye.value)) && NoRematchPairings(m.participants, r.pairings)
conjuncts: m.activeRound.Some? ==> ghost var r: ActiveRound := m.activeRound.value; |r.results| == |r.pairings| && ValidIndices(r.pairings, |m.participants|) && PairingsDistinct(r.pairings) && (r.bye.Some? ==> r.bye.value < |m.participants| && !m.participants[r.bye.value].byeReceived && forall p: Pairing {:trigger p.blackIdx} {:trigger p.whiteIdx} {:trigger p in r.pairings} :: (p in r.pairings ==> p.whiteIdx != r.bye.value) && (p in r.pairings ==> p.blackIdx != r.bye.value)) && NoRematchPairings(m.participants, r.pairings)

predicates.name: Inv
predicates.body: (forall i: int {:trigger m.participants[i]} :: 0 <= i < |m.participants| ==> m.participants[i].score2x >= 0) && (m.phase != Setup ==> m.totalRounds >= 1 && 2 <= |m.participants| <= 19) && (m.phase == Setup ==> m.completedRounds == [] && m.activeRound == None && forall i: int {:trigger m.participants[i]} :: 0 <= i < |m.participants| ==> m.participants[i].opponents == {}) && (m.phase == Playing ==> m.activeRound.Some?) && (m.phase == Finished ==> |m.completedRounds| == m.totalRounds && m.activeRound == None) && CurrentRound(m) <= m.totalRounds && OpponentsSymmetric(m.participants) && OpponentsValid(m.participants) && ColorHistoryConsistency(m.participants) && ActiveRoundValid(m)
conjuncts: forall i: int {:trigger m.participants[i]} :: 0 <= i < |m.participants| ==> m.participants[i].score2x >= 0
m.phase == Setup ==> m.completedRounds == [] && m.activeRound == None && forall i: int {:trigger m.participants[i]} :: 0 <= i < |m.participants| ==> m.participants[i].opponents == {}

predicates.name: HistInv
predicates.body: (forall i: int {:trigger h.past[i]} | 0 <= i < |h.past| :: _default.Inv(h.past[i])) && D.Inv(h.present) && forall j: int {:trigger h.future[j]} | 0 <= j < |h.future| :: _default.Inv(h.future[j])

predicates.name: HistInv
predicates.body: (forall i: int {:trigger h.past[i]} | 0 <= i < |h.past| :: _default.Inv(h.past[i])) && D.Inv(h.present) && forall j: int {:trigger h.future[j]} | 0 <= j < |h.future| :: _default.Inv(h.future[j])

functions.name: ChooseColors
ensures: var pair: Pairing := ChooseColors(p1idx, p2idx, p1, p2); pair == Pairing(p1idx, p2idx) || pair == Pairing(p2idx, p1idx)

functions.name: ExtractResults
requires: forall i: int {:trigger results[i]} :: 0 <= i < |results| ==> results[i].Some?
ensures: forall i: int {:trigger results[i]} {:trigger ExtractResults(results)[i]} :: 0 <= i < |results| ==> ExtractResults(results)[i] == results[i].value

functions.name: UpdateStats
ensures: UpdateStats(p, idx, pairings, bye, results).opponents == p.opponents

functions.name: UpdateStatsFromPairings
ensures: UpdateStatsFromPairings(p, idx, pairings, results, i).opponents == p.opponents

functions.name: AddPairingOpponents
ensures: forall k: int {:trigger participants[k]} {:trigger AddPairingOpponents(participants, w, b)[k]} :: 0 <= k < |participants| && k != w && k != b ==> AddPairingOpponents(participants, w, b)[k] == participants[k]

forall k: int {:trigger participants[k]} {:trigger AddPairingOpponents(participants, w, b)[k]} :: 0 <= k < |participants| && k != w && k != b ==> AddPairingOpponents(participants, w, b)[k].opponents == participants[k].opponents
